raw.population: Index group: N: 49 (Asian) Age: 9.14±4.82 WT: 28±13.9 Validation: N: 17 (Asian) Age: 8.17±3.67 WT: 27.2±9.81
raw.objective: “to evaluate the pharmacokinetics of phenytoin in pediatric patients and the influence of other factors especially the coadministering drugs on its profiles” and “to aid physicians in dose prescribing and adjustment after obtaining the predicted pharmacokinetic parameters, a nomogram is proposed”
raw.covariates: Tested: concomitant medications, AGE, SEX, WT, HT, ethnicity, ideal body mass (IBM), BSA, CLcr, ALAT, ASAT, alkaline phosphatase (ALP), gamma-GT, albumin, bilirubin, urea, creatinine, hemoglobin Included: BSA, ASAT, ALP,WT
raw.observations: Validation of the model against data from 17 patients shows significant overpredictions. Concentrations within the population largely fell outside the therapeutic window, which may impact the estimation of the pharmacokinetic parameters given the non-linearity of PHT elimination
raw.structure: 1-compartment model with bolus infusion and michaelis menten elimination
raw.equations: BSA=0.007184*(HT**0.725)*(WT**0.425) Vmax=(theta1-theta2*BSA+theta3*ASAT+theta4*ALP)*exp(eta1) Km=9.08 V=1.23*WT C=A(1)/V dA(1)/dt=-(Vmax*C)/(Km+C) Cobs=Cipred*exp(eps1)

extraction_target.population: Index group: N: 49 (Asian) Age: 9.14±4.82 WT: 28±13.9 Validation: N: 17 (Asian) Age: 8.17±3.67 WT: 27.2±9.81

structural_model.description: 1-compartment model with bolus infusion and michaelis menten elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: BSA=0.007184*(HT**0.725)*(WT**0.425) Vmax=(theta1-theta2*BSA+theta3*ASAT+theta4*ALP)*exp(eta1) Km=9.08 V=1.23*WT C=A(1)/V dA(1)/dt=-(Vmax*C)/(Km+C) Cobs=Cipred*exp(eps1)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.population: Index group: N: 49 (Asian) Age: 9.14±4.82 WT: 28±13.9 Validation: N: 17 (Asian) Age: 8.17±3.67 WT: 27.2±9.81
study.objective: “to evaluate the pharmacokinetics of phenytoin in pediatric patients and the influence of other factors especially the coadministering drugs on its profiles” and “to aid physicians in dose prescribing and adjustment after obtaining the predicted pharmacokinetic parameters, a nomogram is proposed”

covariates.raw: Tested: concomitant medications, AGE, SEX, WT, HT, ethnicity, ideal body mass (IBM), BSA, CLcr, ALAT, ASAT, alkaline phosphatase (ALP), gamma-GT, albumin, bilirubin, urea, creatinine, hemoglobin Included: BSA, ASAT, ALP,WT

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
